---
title: "Home"
---

# Hi, I'm Timothy

I'm pursuing a **BSc (Hons) in Applied Artificial Intelligence** at the Singapore Institute of Technology.

My research interests include:

- **AI Safety**
- **AI Alignment**
- **Mechanistic Interpretability**

I enjoy experimenting with ideas, replicating research, and sharpening my thinking. I am working toward a career in **AI research**, with the goal of contributing to meaningful and well-grounded intelligent systems.

## Find me online

- [GitHub: timothyckl](https://github.com/timothyckl)

## What this site contains

This Quarto website is a small personal portfolio for AAI1001 Lab 02. It includes:

1. A short introduction to who I am.
2. A portfolio-style project page.
3. A live GitHub-based data visualisation page.
4. A reflection on using GenAI as part of the website-building process.
